rationale: With Novaris holding military advantage and crisis at maximum, a precision strike exploits enemy vulnerability and prevents consolidation of gains.
A show of naval strength in contested waters reinforces our dominance and deters foreign intervention amid high international pressure.
Covert kinetic disruption behind enemy lines degrades logistics and complements offensive operations during this critical phase.
In response to their strengthened cyber defenses, we must launch an offensive cyber operation to degrade command systems while our intelligence advantage still allows plausible deniability.
Conduct covert provocations to discredit Tethyan forces internationally, exploiting high crisis levels and fragmented narratives to sow diplomatic confusion.
Counter Western narratives gaining traction domestically by amplifying internal propaganda that frames sanctions as imperialist aggression.
With sanctions already at 78% severity and defense sector targeted, we must secure critical military inputs now to ensure war-sustaining production.
Mobilize domestic capital to offset revenue losses from sanctions and fund long-term military operations as international support for Tethys remains strong.
Leverage our control over 41.8% of Tethyan territory to restrict resource flows, amplifying economic warfare in coordination with military gains.

With 41.8% territory lost and a negative military balance, we must harden remaining urban and strategic positions to slow Novaris’ advance and buy time for coalition support to translate into battlefield gains.
Increasing tactical vigilance along frontlines and rear areas will counter enemy reconnaissance and prevent surprise incursions during this period of extreme crisis.
Coordinate with intelligence to disrupt forward supply depots and rail logistics inside occupied zones, exploiting enemy overextension.
In direct response to their cyber-physical escalation threat, we must proactively degrade Novaris’ command networks and energy grid control systems to delay offensive operations.
Conduct a deniable operation to expose Novaris’ violations of international cyber norms, amplifying diplomatic pressure and justifying coalition countermeasures.
Provide allied cyber and HUMINT on Novaris’ defense sector vulnerabilities to strengthen coordinated sanctions and military planning.
With over 40% territory occupied and cities under siege, establishing protected routes for civilians and aid is urgent to maintain moral authority and international backing.
Leverage 74% international support to institutionalize the response, pushing for a binding resolution that escalates costs for Novaris’ continued aggression.
Quietly engage non-aligned powers to mediate contingency talks, preserving options if military形势 worsens unexpectedly.
With only 42 days of critical supplies remaining, we must immediately secure fuel, medicine, and food reserves to sustain the war economy and civilian stability.
Launch a national financing campaign to crowd-source domestic capital, reducing reliance on foreign aid and signaling resolve to international markets.
Work through coalition partners to tighten restrictions on dual-use technology and rare minerals, exploiting the 78% sanctions severity to accelerate defense sector strain.
